product.name: ArWoWear T5 Soft
descriptions: ArWoWear T5 Soft is light weight 245 g/m², 65% Polyester 35% Cotton durable workwear twill fabric.
It is the economical version of ArWoWear T5 series.
technicalParameters: Tensile Strength | Warp>1000N; Weft>800N | EN ISO 13934-1
Tear Strength | Warp>20N; Weft>15N | EN ISO 13937-2
Dimensional Change | -3% < Length < +3% ; -3% < Width < +3% | EN ISO 5077
Dry Cleaning Fastness | 4-5 | EN ISO 105 D01
Hot Press Fastness | 4-5 | EN ISO 105 X11
Perspiration Light Fast. | 2-3 | EN ISO 105 B07
Azo Test | No Azo Colorants. | EN ISO 14362-1
Water and Oil Repellent | 4 | EN ISO 4920

possibleButNotAccepted.reason: Generic durable twill workwear/coveralls; no explicit welding, foundry or metal-splash use stated.
No antistatic, arc-protection or EMI shielding property stated; only generic workwear fabric.

modelOutput.noMatchReason: Product is described as an economical, general-purpose polyester/cotton twill workwear fabric intended for coveralls, with only OEKO-TEX certification and water/oil repellency noted. No explicit military, firefighting, energy, welding, motorcycle, hi-vis, medical, sport, architectural or transport use is stated.
